source: " I spent half an hour in the living room telling him about the work of Amnesty . . . . After our meeting , he spoke to about 300 people who were in the garden to hear him talk about his views . He said that if he became president he would make human rights a major part of his foreign policy , " she says .
translation: 她在客厅里花了半小时向他介绍人权组织“Amnesty”的工作……会议结束后，他与在花园里的约300人交谈，向他们讲述自己的观点。她说：“如果他成为总统，他会将人权作为其外交政策的重要部分。”

source: " Old school " still has some currency in hip-hop . It nods to forebears , styles and history . " Old " is a different story . " Old " means you 're past your prime . It means you have nothing new to say -- and even if you did , who would want to listen ? " Old " means maybe you know what 's new , but you want to do it the way you 've always done it . So " old " also means fixed , settled , stuck .
translation: “老派”在嘻哈中仍然有一定的影响力。它向先辈、风格和历史致敬。“老”则完全是另一回事。“老”意味着你已经过了巅峰时期。这意味着你没有什么新的东西可以说——即使有，又有谁会愿意听呢？“老”还意味着或许你知道什么是新的，但你想要以你一直的方式去做。因此，“老”也意味着固定、稳定和僵化。

source: " They hired people that they thought I would scream at , " Ms. Barr said . " And we did n't see that we were played till we ended up with the unairable pilot show . We 're like : ' Oh my God , I see now why the people they hired were all pretty much incapable . ' " Ms. Barr also used other epithets to describe the pilot , but you will not read them in this newspaper .
translation: “他们雇了一些他们以为我会对其大吼大叫的人，”巴尔说，“直到最后搞出那个无法播出的试播节目，我们才意识到自己被耍了。我们当时就想：‘天哪，我现在总算明白了，他们雇的那些人为什么基本上都不中用。’”巴尔还用其他一些难听的字眼来形容这部试播剧，但本报不便刊登。

source: A July 1970 Chile NIE , prepared a little over a month before the September election , raised the question of what an Allende victory would mean to Chile and the United States . The NIE occasioned considerable disagreement within the Washington community . The disagreement reflected a division between the Department of State on one side and the U.S. Ambassador and the CIA Station on the other . The latter position was that an Allende victory would mean the gradual imposition of a classic Marxist-Leninist regime in Chile . This position was reflected , with some qualifying remarks , in the NIE .
translation: 1970年7月的一份智利情况报告，在9月选举前不到一个月完成，提到了如果阿连德获胜将意味着什么，这对智利和美国意味着什么。这份报告在华盛顿社区中引起了不小的争议。这种分歧反映了国务院一方与美国大使馆和中央情报局站台之间的分歧。后者认为，阿连德获胜将意味着智利逐渐被一种经典的马克思主义-列宁主义政权所控制。这种观点在报告中有所反映，但附带了一些限定性评论。

source: Amazon Prime 's video-on-demand service just unlocked a musical milestone : it will be airing the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame 's induction ceremony for the first time ever . HBO has been the Hall of Fame 's conventional broadcasting home , but from July 1st , devotees will be able to watch the event in over 30 countries and eight languages on any device supported by Amazon 's streaming service .
translation: 亚马逊Prime的点播服务刚刚解锁了一个音乐里程碑：它将首次播出摇滚名人堂的入堂仪式。以往，HBO一直是摇滚名人堂的传统广播合作伙伴，但从7月1日起，全球超过30个国家和8种语言的粉丝们可以通过亚马逊的流媒体服务，在任何支持的设备上观看这一活动。

source: As a product of the Mississippi town of Weir ( population roughly 550 ) , Oswalt likes to say everywhere he goes is bigger , so he 's used to the feeling . He was already an accomplished pitcher with a 19-win season in 2002 when Clemens and Pettitte brought their big resumes into Houston from New York .
translation: 奥斯瓦特来自密西西比州仅有550人口的韦尔小镇，他总喜欢说，无论走到哪里都比家乡大，对此早已习以为常。早在2002年，当克莱门斯和佩蒂特带着他们显赫的履历从纽约转会休斯顿时，这位投手就已经单季豪取19胜，成就斐然。

source: At no point were Constitutional rights ever surrendered . When you board an airplane , you are agreeing to the terms and conditions the airlines have described on the back of the ticket . Flying is not a right , it is a privilege . There is nothing in the bill of rights that says every person in America has the right to fly commercial .
translation: 在任何时候，宪法权利都没有被放弃。当你登上飞机时，你就接受了航空公司在票背面列出的条款和条件。飞行是一种特权，而不是一种权利。美国宪法中没有规定每个人都有权乘坐商用飞机。

source: Been done , being done -- David has covered the amazingly fast progress on the strains in question in other posts here at biofortified . So rather than blocking anything it would appear that those who know the most on this issue here at biofortified ( David ) are actually up to date on the material and cover it with a certain degree of excitement .
translation: 已完成，正在完成——大卫已经在其他帖子中覆盖了关于这些菌株令人惊讶的快速进展。因此，似乎在这里biofortified上了解最多的人（大卫）实际上是对此材料保持最新，并且以一定的兴奋程度进行覆盖。

source: From the beginning , the group 's prophet-like leader had preached that a " waterless flood " was coming to wipe out humanity . In addition to their dogmatic environmentalism , the group believed in preparing for this flood with survival skills and food caches called " Ararats . " The predicted day has come in the form of a global pandemic . Society has broken down completely . From their respective places of isolation , each woman wonders if she may be the last human left and struggles to survive in this altered world .
translation: 从一开始，这个群体的先知般的领袖就预言，一场“无水洪水”即将来临，将人类彻底抹去。除了他们教条式的环保主义，这个群体相信，为了应对这场洪水，他们需要掌握生存技能，并储备被称为“阿拉拉特”的食物。预言的日子以一场全球大流行病的形式到来了。社会已经完全崩溃。从各自的隔离地点，每个女人都在怀疑自己是否是最后一个人类，并在这个改变的世界中努力求生。

source: Herbert shrugged his shoulders. “There has always been an Estella, since I have heard of a Miss Havisham. I know no more. And now, Handel,” said he, finally throwing off the story as it were, “there is a perfectly open understanding between us. All that I know about Miss Havisham, you know.”
translation: 赫伯特耸了耸肩。“自从我听说有位哈维沙姆小姐以来，就一直有个埃斯特拉。我知道的也就这么多。现在，汉德尔，”他最后仿佛是把这故事甩掉似的说，“我们之间已经完全坦诚相待了。关于哈维沙姆小姐的事，你知道的和我一样多。”

source: If you 've visited a model home recently , you know that the American house is changing , as it sprouts new office rooms ( often replacing the old " den " or " sewing room " ) and sometimes whole outbuildings to accommodate work best done out of range of the kids . And it is the kids who surely stand to benefit : One of the great advantages of working at home is the added time with one 's family it affords , once you realize how much day is left after you 've lopped off those hours for commuting and water cooler schmoozing .
translation: 如果你最近参观过样板房，你就会知道美国家庭的住宅正在发生变化，新增了办公室（通常取代了旧的“家庭活动室”或“缝纫室”），有时甚至会有独立的建筑来容纳那些最好远离孩子们的工作。而真正受益的无疑是孩子们：在家工作的一个巨大优势就是可以增加与家人相处的时间，一旦你意识到去掉通勤和在水冷却器旁闲聊的时间后，一天还剩下多少时间。

source: In answer to the question , Refuge from what ? Gullickson responds , " As much as we like the Bay area and all it has to offer , this is a counterpoint to urban living , an escape from the traffic and the noise and the hustle and bustle of the city . I think gardens for most people are a way of keeping in touch with the nonhuman world , with nature . It certainly is that for us . And it 's not like creating a piece of art that does n't change once it is completed . It 's a process that we are continually involved in . "
translation: 针对“逃离什么”的问题，Gullickson回应道：“尽管我们很喜欢湾区及其所提供的一切，但这是对城市生活的回应，是逃离交通、噪音和城市喧嚣的一种方式。我认为，对大多数人来说，花园是与非人类世界、与自然保持联系的一种方式。对我们来说，花园确实起到了这样的作用。它不像完成一件艺术品那样一劳永逸。它是一个我们一直在参与的过程。”

source: It appears that the climate toward Mitt Romney in Europe is warming up , as his chances of victory improve . For Germany 's business daily Handelsblatt , columnist Wolfram Weimer writes that even if Romney is more talk than action when it comes to ties to Europe , he will likely be better for the old world than Obama , who has few ties to Europe , favors fiscal policies at odds with Berlin , and is more likely to let NATO ' languish ' than reinvigorate it .
translation: 随着米特·罗姆尼获胜的几率增加，欧洲对他的气氛似乎正在升温。德国商业日报《商报》的专栏作家沃尔夫拉姆·魏默写道，即使罗姆尼在与欧洲的关系问题上只是说说而已，但他对旧世界来说可能比奥巴马更好，奥巴马与欧洲几乎没有什么联系，财政政策与柏林不一致，更有可能让北约“萎靡不振”，而不是重振它。

source: It was wretched weather; stormy and wet, stormy and wet; and mud, mud, mud, deep in all the streets. Day after day, a vast heavy veil had been driving over London from the East, and it drove still, as if in the East there were an eternity of cloud and wind. So furious had been the gusts, that high buildings in town had had the lead stripped off their roofs; and in the country, trees had been torn up, and sails of windmills carried away; and gloomy accounts had come in from the coast, of shipwreck and death. Violent blasts of rain had accompanied these rages of wind, and the day just closed as I sat down to read had been the worst of all.
translation: 天气糟糕透了，暴风雨不断，湿漉漉的；街道上满是泥泞，泥泞，泥泞，到处都是深及脚踝的烂泥。从东方，一片厚重的乌云密布的帷幔笼罩着伦敦，这层帷幔还在继续驱赶而来，仿佛东方永远都云遮雾绕。风力之强，以至于市区的高楼屋顶上的铅皮都被刮走了；而在乡间，树木被连根拔起，风车的帆也被吹走了；海岸那边传来令人沮丧的消息，船只失事，有人丧生。狂风伴随着倾盆大雨肆虐，当我坐下来读书时，那天正是其中最糟糕的一天。

source: Killing innocent baby humans while claiming they are n't actually baby humans is absurd in the extreme . Killing any group of innocent people using the lie " ... but these people are n't really people so its okay " is an outage of horrendous magnitude that must not be allowed to continue to slaughter any segment of humanity in order to appease the carnal degradations of any other .
translation: 声称无辜的婴儿人类不是真正的婴儿人类从而杀害他们是极其荒谬的。用“……但这些人其实不是真正的人类，所以就可以杀”这样的谎言来杀害任何一群无辜的人，是一种极其可怕的暴行，必须不允许以此来满足任何其他人的兽性堕落而继续屠杀人类中的任何一部分。

source: Klein was at a Mill Valley espresso bar - this was back when she still drank espresso - when she met a limo driver . He worked for Michael Klein , the son of one of the founders of Bally 's Las Vegas resort and casino . Michael Klein , now 47XX , was a multimillionaire whiz kid with a business degree from Harvard who had recently sold his telecommunications company . He had given up his fast-track life in Manhattan , one in which he ate out with abandon 200 nights a year , and moved to the Bay Area where he met Grateful Dead guitarist Bob Weir at a flag football game . Klein ended up touring with the band and running Weir 's Novato-based guitar company , Modulus . The two also shared some political causes , most notably efforts to save the world 's rain forests .
translation: 克莱恩在米尔谷一家意式咖啡吧——那时候她还喝浓缩咖啡——遇到了一位豪华轿车司机。这位司机为迈克尔·克莱恩工作，而迈克尔·克莱恩是Bally's拉斯维加斯度假村和赌场的创始人之一的儿子。现年47岁的迈克尔·克莱恩是一位来自哈佛商学院的年轻亿万富翁，不久前刚刚卖掉了自己的电信公司。他放弃了曼哈顿那种快节奏的生活方式——一年在外就餐多达200个夜晚——搬到了旧金山湾区，在那里他通过参加一场国旗足球赛认识了格雷森乐队的吉他手鲍勃·韦尔。克莱恩最终加入了乐队，并经营着韦尔在诺瓦托的吉他公司Modulus。两人还共享一些政治理念，其中最引人注目的就是拯救全球雨林的努力。

source: Many of the young people who once left the island in search of better paying jobs in the cities have returned , disillusioned with their fading prospects . Because of high unemployment rates , some have no choice but to move back in with parents and grandparents , but others see the lifestyle of their forbearers as a viable alternative .
translation: 曾经离开岛屿到城市寻找更高薪工作的许多年轻人已经返回，对他们的前景日渐渺茫感到失望。由于失业率高企，一些人不得不搬回与父母或祖父母同住，但另一些人则看到了祖辈生活方式的可行性。

source: Most commonly you are audited because a computer has raised a number of " flags . " It 's a matter of percentage . If your tax return reveals deductions that , in the opinion of the IRS , exceed an acceptable percentage in a certain area , you will probably be selected for an audit . For instance , if you declare unusually high medical expenses or claim several thousand dollars in charitable contributions , your return triggers flags . If enough flags go up , your return is selected for audit .
translation: 最常见的审计原因是计算机系统触发了多个“警示标志”。这与比例有关。如果您的报税表中显示的扣除项，在国税局看来，超过了某个领域的可接受比例，您可能会被选中进行审计。例如，如果您申报了异常高的医疗费用或声称有数千美元的慈善捐款，您的报税表就会触发警示标志。如果触发的警示标志足够多，您的报税表就会被选中进行审计。

source: Oliver’s colour rose as he said this; he breathed quickly; and there was a curious working of the mouth and nostrils, which Mr. Claypole thought must be the immediate precursor of a violent fit of crying. Under this impression he returned to the charge.
translation: 奥利弗的脸涨得通红，他急促地喘息着，嘴唇和鼻孔在奇怪地抽动着，克拉普尔先生认为这一定是发脾气的前兆。克拉普尔先生这样认为，接着又追问道。

source: One afternoon, the Dodger and Master Bates being engaged out that evening, the first-named young gentleman took it into his head to evince some anxiety regarding the decoration of his person (to do him justice, this was by no means an habitual weakness with him); and, with this end and aim, he condescendingly commanded Oliver to assist him in his toilet, straightway.
translation: 一天下午，因为道奇和巴茨先生当晚都有约会，这位年轻的先生不知怎的就想到要关心一下自己的仪表（说句公道话，这对他来说并非是常见的弱点），于是，他屈尊命令奥利弗立即去伺候他梳妆打扮。

source: Only his daughter had the power of charming this black brooding from his mind. She was the golden thread that united him to a Past beyond his misery, and to a Present beyond his misery: and the sound of her voice, the light of her face, the touch of her hand, had a strong beneficial influence with him almost always. Not absolutely always, for she could recall some occasions on which her power had failed; but they were few and slight, and she believed them over.
translation: 只有他的女儿拥有让他从心中驱散那黑沉男子的力量。她是连接他超越痛苦的过去与现在的一根金线：她的声音、脸庞的光芒、手的触感，几乎总是对他产生一种强大的有益影响。并非总是如此，因为她有时会想起她力量曾失效的一些时刻；但这样的情况并不多，也并不严重，她相信那些回忆已经过去了。

source: Problem Solver -- Caine was a tinkerer . He loves to figure out how to make things better . More than that , he 's a problem solver . When his dad suggests he build a claw of his own for a game , Caine MacGyvers something out of string and a hook . Not too different from a young Steve Jobs , who spent countless hours fiddling with electronics and building kits when he was a kid .
translation: 问题解决者——凯恩是个捣鼓手。他喜欢想办法让事情变得更好。更重要的是，他是个问题解决者。当他的父亲建议他为游戏制作一个自己的爪子时，凯恩·马盖先用绳子和钩子做了一个东西。这与年轻的史蒂夫·乔布斯没什么不同，乔布斯小时候花了无数的时间摆弄电子产品和组装工具。

source: Regular daily consumption of caffeine in three or more cups of coffee is known to reduce cognitive decline among the aging . It now seems to preserve- even restoreworking memory in those with Alzheimer 's disease , by inhibiting production of beta-amyloid , a protein that accumulates in the aging brain and forms plaques that give rise to the degenerative disease . University of South Florida scientists found that caffeine reduces amyloid deposition in the hippocampi of rats .
translation: 每天飲用三杯或以上的咖啡，已知能夠減少老年人的認知功能下降。現在似乎能夠保護，甚至恢復阿茲海默症患者的工作記憶，方法是通過抑制β-淀粉樣蛋白的生成，β-淀粉樣蛋白是一種在老年大腦中積累並形成老年斑的蛋白質，導致退行性疾病。南佛羅里達大學的科學家發現咖啡因能夠減少大鼠海馬體的淀粉樣蛋白沉積。

source: Some recent research questions the effectiveness of glucosamine and chondroitin sulfate , but strong evidence suggests that a high-quality brand can help reduce joint pain and inflammation without some of the side effects associated with NSAIDs . Look for a supplement that is NSF " Certified for Sport . " My go-to is Cosamin ASU , made by Nutramax .
translation: 最近的一些研究质疑葡萄糖胺和硫酸软骨素的效果，但强有力的证据表明，高品质的品牌可以帮助减轻关节疼痛和炎症，而无需像非甾体抗炎药（NSAIDs）那样产生一些副作用。寻找一个通过NSF“认证运动”的补充剂。我推荐Cosamin ASU，由Nutramax生产。

source: The Allez Comp Compact comes outfitted with the new SRAM Apex group ( and Tektro brake calipers ) and Mavic CXP22 rims . The frame is E5 aluminum , which Specialized claims to be 20 percent stiffer than 2010 's incarnation . A FACT carbon fork ( with aluminum crown and steerer tube ) rounds out the package .
translation: 阿莱克斯·科普紧凑型配备了新的SRAM Apex套件（以及特技刹车卡钳）和麦迪克CXP22轮圈。车架采用E5铝合金，据Specialized声称，其刚性比2010年版本提高了20%。碳纤维前叉（带有铝制叉肩和顶管）则为这套配置画上了句号。

source: The Canadian health system already imposes limits on premiums and budget spending . Under Canada 's government-funded health system , established nationwide in 1971 , patients shoulder little or none of the cost of their care . This predictably has escalated demands for services and thus prompted a steady tightening of government regulations to control costs . The results : physician fees are rigidly controlled and the introduction of new technology and certain services are limited . ( See " Should We Adopt Canada 's Health Care System ? " CR , May 1990 . ) To see how the Clinton plan might affect patients , therefore , it is instructive to look at what global budgets and price controls have meant for Canada .
translation: 加拿大的医疗系统已经对保险费和预算支出设定了限制。根据1971年在全国范围内建立的由政府资助的医疗系统，患者几乎不需要承担或完全不承担其医疗费用。这不可避免地增加了对医疗服务的需求，从而促使政府不断收紧法规以控制成本。结果是：医生的费用受到严格控制，新技术和某些服务的引入也受到了限制。（参见“我们是否应该采用加拿大的医疗系统？”《消费者报告》，1990年5月。）因此，要了解克林顿计划可能如何影响患者，研究全球预算和价格控制对加拿大意味着什么是有指导意义的。

source: The Jew inflicted a smart blow on Oliver’s shoulders with the club; and was raising it for a second, when the girl, rushing forward, wrested it from his hand. She flung it into the fire, with a force that brought some of the glowing coals whirling out into the room.
translation: 那个犹太人用棍子在奥利弗的肩膀上打了一下，正要再次举起棍子时，女孩猛地冲过来，把棍子从他手里夺了过去。她用力将棍子扔进火里，火星四溅，一些燃烧的煤块也飞到了房间里。

source: The Jew released his hold, and they rushed tumultuously from the room. The candle, wasted by the draught, was standing where it had been placed. It showed them only the empty staircase, and their own white faces. They listened intently: a profound silence reigned throughout the house.
translation: 那个犹太人松开了手，他们急匆匆地从房间里冲了出来。被风吹灭的蜡烛仍旧立在原来的地方。它只给他们展示了空荡荡的楼梯，以及他们自己苍白的脸庞。他们屏住呼吸倾听：整个房子里一片沉寂。

source: The Omaha , Neb. , firm now expects to earn 16 cents to 19 cents a share in the second quarter ending in March and 56 cents to 79 cents a share for the full 2004 fiscal year . The top end of the projections did n't change , but the bottom end was lifted . Last month , Ameritrade expected earnings per share could fall to as low as 13 cents for the second quarter and to 53 cents for the full fiscal year .
translation: 美国爱荷华州的这家公司在第二季度结束于三月时预计每股收益将在16美分到19美分之间，全年2004财政年度每股收益预计在56美分到79美分之间。不过，预测的底部区间有所上调。上个月，Ameritrade预计第二季度每股收益可能低至13美分，全年财政年度每股收益可能低至53美分。

source: The allusion served as a timely reminder to Darnay that this disagreeable companion had, of his own free will, assisted him in the strait of the day. He turned the dialogue to that point, and thanked him for it.
translation: 这个暗示及时提醒了达内：这位不讨喜的同伴曾在当日的危难关头主动伸出援手。他随即就此事展开话题，向对方表达了谢忱。

source: The ambivalence reflects the diversity in society , says psychologist Marilyn Ruman , Encino , Calif . " When you feel really committed to something , you have to examine it , " she says . " Most people believe a value worth holding is a value worth examining . This has been a time of examining our values . "
translation: 这种矛盾心态反映了社会的多样性，心理学家玛琳·鲁曼（加利福尼亚州恩西诺）说。她说：“当你对某件事真正投入时，你必须审视它。”她表示：“大多数人认为，值得持有的价值观也是值得审视的价值观。这是一个审视我们价值观的时刻。”

source: The felicitous idea occurred to me a morning or two later when I woke, that the best step I could take towards making myself uncommon was to get out of Biddy everything she knew. In pursuance of this luminous conception I mentioned to Biddy when I went to Mr. Wopsle’s great-aunt’s at night, that I had a particular reason for wishing to get on in life, and that I should feel very much obliged to her if she would impart all her learning to me. Biddy, who was the most obliging of girls, immediately said she would, and indeed began to carry out her promise within five minutes.
translation: 这个美妙的想法是在我醒来后两天左右才突然想到的，那就是为了让自己变得不普通，我所能采取的最佳步骤就是把贝迪（Biddy）知道的一切都从她那里拿走。出于这样的光明想法，我晚上去见伍普斯勒先生的姑婆时，告诉贝迪我有一个特别的理由希望在人生中有所成就，并且如果她愿意将自己所有的知识传授给我，我会非常感激她。贝迪是所有女孩中最乐于助人的一个，她立刻就答应了，并且事实上，在五分钟之内就开始履行她的诺言了。

source: The message was from someone who actually does know about tough losses : former Navy coach Paul Evans . Eighteen games into his first season at Navy , Lange decided to take him up on his offer . He called . He wanted to talk . As frustrating as his team 's shooting had been , the fact that the Midshipmen had given up 63 points to a team averaging fewer than 40 a game in the Patriot League was even more disturbing .
translation: 这条信息来自一个真正了解艰难失败的人：前海军教练保罗·埃文斯。在兰格海军生涯的第一个赛季进行了18场比赛后，他决定接受保罗的提议。他打了电话，他想要谈谈。尽管他的球队的投篮表现令人沮丧，但更让人不安的是，海军学员队竟然让一支在爱国者联盟中平均每场得分不到40分的球队得到了63分。

source: The old man was up, betimes, next morning, and waited impatiently for the appearance of his new associate, who after a delay that seemed interminable, at length presented himself, and commenced a voracious assault on the breakfast.

source: This unique show is the brainchild of producer/director Jim Duffy , a veteran documentary filmmaker , author and musician who has created programming for Discovery Network and other national media outlets . " I combined the two elements I love most : music and storytelling , " explains Duffy . source: To catch smuggled weapons , visitors are searched before entering the jails and employees pass through metal detectors , or magnometers . But in October , when Correction Department investigators conducted a surprise check of the staff entrances at nine Rikers jails , they found the magnometers were not on at three of the jails , according to a report on the examination . At six of the jails , investigators noted , the staff members were not accustomed to regular searches . Officers have since been retrained in security procedures , an official said .
translation: 为了查获走私武器，访客在进入监狱前会被检查，员工则会通过金属探测器或磁性探测器。但在10月，当矫正部门的调查人员对九个里克ers监狱的员工入口进行突击检查时，他们发现有三家监狱的磁性探测器没有开启，根据检查报告所述。调查人员在六家监狱中注意到，员工们并不习惯接受常规检查。一位官员表示，警官们此后已经重新接受了安全程序的培训。

source: When the disciples got out of the boat , they saw some bread and a charcoal fire with fish on it . Jesus told his disciples , " Bring some of the fish you just caught . " Simon Peter got back into the boat and dragged the net to shore . In it were one hundred fifty-three large fish , but still the net did not rip .
translation: 门徒下船后，看见有饼和炭火，上面有鱼。耶稣对门徒说：“把你们刚才捕到的鱼拿几条来。”西门彼得回到船上，把网拖到岸边。网里有一百五十三条大鱼，但网还是没有破。

source: While Cohen 's teaching methods instill an excitement about business in her students , they also convey lessons about failure that any embattled entrepreneur would understand . Unfettered by society 's scrutiny , her students are tenacious : if one idea for a business does n't fly , they eagerly come up with another .
translation: 科恩的教学方法不仅激发了学生对商业的热情，还传达了关于失败的教训，这是任何身处困境的企业家都能理解的。不受社会审视的束缚，她的学生们非常坚韧：如果一个商业想法行不通，他们就会迫不及待地想出另一个。

source: Who gave them out, whence they last came, where they began, through what agency they crookedly quivered and jerked, scores at a time, over the heads of the crowd, like a kind of lightning, no eye in the throng could have told; but, muskets were being distributed—so were cartridges, powder, and ball, bars of iron and wood, knives, axes, pikes, every weapon that distracted ingenuity could discover or devise. People who could lay hold of nothing else, set themselves with bleeding hands to force stones and bricks out of their places in walls. Every pulse and heart in Saint Antoine was on high-fever strain and at high-fever heat. Every living creature there held life as of no account, and was demented with a passionate readiness to sacrifice it.
translation: 谁分发了这些武器，它们最后从哪里来，它们从哪里开始，它们通过什么方式扭曲地颤动和抽搐，几十个，像一道闪电一样，在人群的头顶上飞过，人群中没有一个人能看得出来；但是，火枪正在分发——还有子弹、火药、子弹、铁棒和木棒、刀、斧头、长矛，所有分散智慧的武器都能发现或设计出来。那些什么也抓不住的人，用血淋淋的手把墙上的石头和砖块从原处推下来。圣安东尼的每一条脉搏和心脏都在高热和高烧中。那里的每一个生物都不把生命当回事，疯狂地准备牺牲生命。

source: Yet sometimes , the worst possible betrayals can be healed . In my experience of working with families who are trying to reconcile , the best outcomes occur when adult children are able to talk about their experience in the family and the parents are willing to admit to the possibility that they caused harm .
translation: 然而，有时最严重的背叛也能得到修复。在我的与试图和解的家庭合作经验中，当成年子女能够谈论他们在家庭中的经历，而父母愿意承认自己可能造成了伤害的可能性时，最佳的结果就会出现。

source: “Emigrants have no rights, Evrémonde,” was the stolid reply. The officer wrote until he had finished, read over to himself what he had written, sanded it, and handed it to Defarge, with the words “In secret.”

source: “I won’t be ten minutes, sir,” said Oliver, eagerly. Having buttoned up the bank-note in his jacket pocket, and placed the books carefully under his arm, he made a respectful bow, and left the room. Mrs. Bedwin followed him to the street-door, giving him many directions about the nearest way, and the name of the bookseller, and the name of the street: all of which Oliver said he clearly understood. Having superadded many injunctions to be sure and not take cold, the old lady at length permitted him to depart.
translation: “先生，我十分钟就回来，”奥利弗急不可待地说。他把钞票在上衣里边的口袋藏好扣好，把书夹在胳膊下边，恭恭敬敬鞠了一躬，离开房间。班布尔太太一直把他送到大门口，一路上给了他许多指点，最近的路怎么走，书商的姓名，以及哪一条街。奥利弗说他一切都能记住。老太太又嘱咐了许多话，务必及早回来，不要着了凉等等，终于放他走了。

source: “Not all of one kind,” resumed Biddy. “He may be too proud to let any one take him out of a place that he is competent to fill, and fills well and with respect. To tell you the truth, I think he is; though it sounds bold in me to say so, for you must know him far better than I do.”
translation: “并非全都一样，”比迪继续说道，“他也许太骄傲了，不愿让任何人将他从胜任的工作岗位上拉走，而且他工作出色，深得尊重。说实在话，我认为是这样；不过我这么说可能是有点放肆，因为您对他比我知道得更多。”

source: “Thankee, Sir,” returned Joe, evidently dispirited by the proposal, “since you are so kind as make chice of coffee, I will not run contrairy to your own opinions. But don’t you never find it a little ’eating?”

source: “The rest, eh, Pip?” said Joe, looking at it with a slow, searching eye, “One, two, three. Why, here’s three Js, and three Os, and three J-O, Joes in it, Pip!”

source: “You bring me, to-morrow morning early, that file and them wittles. You bring the lot to me, at that old Battery over yonder. You do it, and you never dare to say a word or dare to make a sign concerning your having seen such a person as me, or any person sumever, and you shall be let to live. You fail, or you go from my words in any partickler, no matter how small it is, and your heart and your liver shall be tore out, roasted, and ate. Now, I ain’t alone, as you may think I am. There’s a young man hid with me, in comparison with which young man I am a Angel. That young man hears the words I speak. That young man has a secret way pecooliar to himself, of getting at a boy, and at his heart, and at his liver. It is in wain for a boy to attempt to hide himself from that young man. A boy may lock his door, may be warm in bed, may tuck himself up, may draw the clothes over his head, may think himself comfortable and safe, but that young man will softly creep and creep his way to him and tear him open. I am a keeping that young man from harming of you at the present moment, with great difficulty. I find it wery hard to hold that young man off of your inside. Now, what do you say?”
translation: “你明天早上一早把那份文件和那些食物带给我。把所有东西都带到那边的旧炮台。你照做，不敢说出一个字，也不敢做出任何暗示，关于你见过我或其他任何人，你就可以保住性命。你失败了，或者在任何细节上违背我的话，无论多小，你的心脏和肝脏都会被撕出来，烤着吃掉。现在，我并不像你想象的那样孤单。有一个年轻人和我一起躲藏，相比之下，我算是一个天使。那年轻人听到了我说的话。那年轻人有他自己特殊的方式，可以接近一个男孩，接近他的心脏和肝脏。一个男孩试图躲藏是徒劳的。一个男孩可能锁上他的门，可能在床上感到温暖，可能把自己裹起来，可能把被子拉过头，可能觉得自己舒适而安全，但是那个年轻人会悄悄地爬过去，爬过去，撕开他。目前，我正在极力阻止那个年轻人伤害你。我发现很难阻止那个年轻人伤害你的内脏。现在，你说什么？”

source: “You shall read them, if you behave well,” said the old gentleman kindly; “and you will like that, better than looking at the outsides,—that is, some cases; because there are books of which the backs and covers are by far the best parts.”

He said that if he became president he would make human rights a major part of his foreign policy , " she says .

source: " Old school " still has some currency in hip-hop . It nods to forebears , styles and history . " Old " is a different story . " Old " means you 're past your prime . It means you have nothing new to say -- and even if you did , who would want to listen ? " Old " means maybe you know what 's new , but you want to do it the way you 've always done it . So " old " also means fixed , settled , stuck .
translation: “老派”在嘻哈音乐中仍然有一定的影响力。它向先辈、风格和历史致敬。“老”则不同。“老”意味着你已经过了巅峰时期。这意味着你没有什么新东西可说——即使你有，谁会愿意听呢？“老”意味着也许你知道什么是新的，但你想按照你一贯的做法去做。所以“老”也意味着固定、安定、停滞不前。

source: " They hired people that they thought I would scream at , " Ms. Barr said . " And we did n't see that we were played till we ended up with the unairable pilot show . We 're like : ' Oh my God , I see now why the people they hired were all pretty much incapable . ' " Ms. Barr also used other epithets to describe the pilot , but you will not read them in this newspaper .
translation: 巴尔女士说：“他们雇佣了他们认为我会对他们大喊大叫的人，”“而且在我们最终拍出了不能播出的试播集之前，我们没有意识到我们被骗了。我们都说：‘哦我的天哪，我现在明白为什么他们雇佣的人几乎都很无能。’”巴尔女士还用其他绰号来形容这个试播集，但是你不会在这份报纸上读到那些内容。

source: A July 1970 Chile NIE , prepared a little over a month before the September election , raised the question of what an Allende victory would mean to Chile and the United States . The NIE occasioned considerable disagreement within the Washington community . The disagreement reflected a division between the Department of State on one side and the U.S. Ambassador and the CIA Station on the other . The latter position was that an Allende victory would mean the gradual imposition of a classic Marxist-Leninist regime in Chile . This position was reflected , with some qualifying remarks , in the NIE .
translation: 1970年7月，智利的一份NIE（National Intelligence Estimate，国家情报评估）是在九月选举前夕大约一个月时撰写的。该NIE提出了阿连德获胜对智利和美国意味着什么的问题。这份NIE在华盛顿社区内引起了相当大的分歧。这种分歧反映了国务院与美国大使及中央情报局驻地之间的分歧。后者认为，如果阿连德获胜，将意味着智利逐渐建立一个经典的马克思主义-列宁主义政权。这一观点在NIE中有所体现，并附有一些限定性评论。

source: Amazon Prime 's video-on-demand service just unlocked a musical milestone : it will be airing the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame 's induction ceremony for the first time ever . HBO has been the Hall of Fame 's conventional broadcasting home , but from July 1st , devotees will be able to watch the event in over 30 countries and eight languages on any device supported by Amazon 's streaming service .
translation: 亚马逊Prime的点播服务刚刚取得了一个音乐里程碑：它将首次播出摇滚名人堂的入选典礼。HBO一直是摇滚名人堂的传统广播平台，但从7月1日开始，粉丝们将能够在30多个国家和八种语言中，在任何支持亚马逊流媒体服务的设备上观看该活动。

source: As a product of the Mississippi town of Weir ( population roughly 550 ) , Oswalt likes to say everywhere he goes is bigger , so he 's used to the feeling . He was already an accomplished pitcher with a 19-win season in 2002 when Clemens and Pettitte brought their big resumes into Houston from New York .
translation: 作为密西西比州韦尔镇（人口约550人）的产物，奥斯瓦尔特喜欢说他去过的每一个地方都比他的家乡大，所以他对此已经习惯了。2002年，他已经是德克萨斯州棒球队的一名优秀投手，曾在一个赛季中赢得19场比赛，而克莱门斯和佩蒂特则带着他们辉煌的成绩单从纽约来到休斯顿。

source: At no point were Constitutional rights ever surrendered . When you board an airplane , you are agreeing to the terms and conditions the airlines have described on the back of the ticket . Flying is not a right , it is a privilege . There is nothing in the bill of rights that says every person in America has the right to fly commercial .
translation: 任何时候都未曾放弃过宪法赋予的权利。当你登上飞机时，即表示你同意航空公司印在机票背面的条款和条件。飞行并非一项与生俱来的权利，而是一种需要遵循规则的优待。《权利法案》中没有任何条款规定每个美国人都有权乘坐商业航班。

source: Been done , being done -- David has covered the amazingly fast progress on the strains in question in other posts here at biofortified . source: From the beginning , the group 's prophet-like leader had preached that a " waterless flood " was coming to wipe out humanity . In addition to their dogmatic environmentalism , the group believed in preparing for this flood with survival skills and food caches called " Ararats . " The predicted day has come in the form of a global pandemic . Society has broken down completely . From their respective places of isolation , each woman wonders if she may be the last human left and struggles to survive in this altered world .
translation: 从一开始，这个团体的先知般的领导人就宣扬有一场“无水洪水”即将来临，摧毁整个人类。在他们的教条式环境主义之外，这个团体相信通过生存技能和称为“亚拉臠山”的食物储备来为这场洪水做准备。预言中的日子终于以全球大流行的形式到来了。整个社会已经完全崩溃。在她们各自的孤立之地，每个女人都在想自己是否是最后一个幸存的人，并努力在这个改变了的世界中生存。

source: Herbert shrugged his shoulders. “There has always been an Estella, since I have heard of a Miss Havisham. I know no more. And now, Handel,” said he, finally throwing off the story as it were, “there is a perfectly open understanding between us. All that I know about Miss Havisham, you know.”
translation: 赫伯特耸了耸肩。“自从我听说哈维希.am小姐以来，就一直有一个埃斯特拉。我知道的就这么多。现在，汉德尔，”他说着，似乎终于把这个故事抛在脑后，“我和她之间已经完全坦诚相见。关于哈维希.am小姐的事情，你都知道了。”

source: If you 've visited a model home recently , you know that the American house is changing , as it sprouts new office rooms ( often replacing the old " den " or " sewing room " ) and sometimes whole outbuildings to accommodate work best done out of range of the kids . And it is the kids who surely stand to benefit : One of the great advantages of working at home is the added time with one 's family it affords , once you realize how much day is left after you 've lopped off those hours for commuting and water cooler schmoozing .
translation: 如果你最近参观过样板间，你就会知道美国的房子正在发生变化，因为它们长出了新的办公室空间（通常取代了旧的“休息室”或“缝纫室”），有时甚至整个附属建筑来适应那些原本需要在孩子之外完成的工作。而孩子们无疑会从中受益：在家工作的一个巨大优势就是可以与家人共度更多的时间，在你意识到每天还有多少时间被通勤和闲聊所消耗之后。

source: In answer to the question , Refuge from what ? Gullickson responds , " As much as we like the Bay area and all it has to offer , this is a counterpoint to urban living , an escape from the traffic and the noise and the hustle and bustle of the city . I think gardens for most people are a way of keeping in touch with the nonhuman world , with nature . It certainly is that for us . And it 's not like creating a piece of art that does n't change once it is completed . It 's a process that we are continually involved in . "
translation: 针对“避难于什么？”这个问题，古利克森回答说：“尽管我们喜欢旧金山湾区及其提供的所有便利，这里却是城市生活的一种补充，是逃离交通拥堵、喧嚣和城市的繁忙。我认为，对大多数人来说，花园是一种与非人类世界、与自然保持联系的方式。对我们来说确实如此。而且，这并不像创作一件完成后就不会再改变的艺术品。这是一个我们持续参与的过程。”

source: It appears that the climate toward Mitt Romney in Europe is warming up , as his chances of victory improve . For Germany 's business daily Handelsblatt , columnist Wolfram Weimer writes that even if Romney is more talk than action when it comes to ties to Europe , he will likely be better for the old world than Obama , who has few ties to Europe , favors fiscal policies at odds with Berlin , and is more likely to let NATO ' languish ' than reinvigorate it .
translation: 欧洲对 Mitt Romney（米特•罗姆尼）的态度似乎在逐渐变暖，因为他的胜算在增大。德国商业日报《Handelsblatt》专栏作家沃尔夫拉姆•韦默尔（Wolfram Weimer）撰文称，即使罗姆尼在对欧关系上只停留在口头上，但他对欧洲而言，很可能比奥巴马要好，因为奥巴马对欧洲的联系很少，推崇的财政政策与柏林方面不一致，而且让北约"凋零"的可能性更大，而不是让北约重获新生。

source: It was wretched weather; stormy and wet, stormy and wet; and mud, mud, mud, deep in all the streets. Day after day, a vast heavy veil had been driving over London from the East, and it drove still, as if in the East there were an eternity of cloud and wind. So furious had been the gusts, that high buildings in town had had the lead stripped off their roofs; and in the country, trees had been torn up, and sails of windmills carried away; and gloomy accounts had come in from the coast, of shipwreck and death. Violent blasts of rain had accompanied these rages of wind, and the day just closed as I sat down to read had been the worst of all.
translation: 天气糟糕透了，风雨交加，泥泞遍地，街道上到处都是厚厚的泥浆。日复一日，一片厚重的帷幕从东方笼罩了伦敦，仿佛东方有无尽的乌云和狂风。风势之猛烈，以至于城里的高楼被掀掉了铅皮屋顶；乡下则是树木被连根拔起，风车的叶片也被吹走；沿海地区传来了船只失事和人员丧生的悲惨消息。伴随着这些狂风的是猛烈的暴雨，而我坐下来读书的这一天，正是最糟糕的一天。

source: Killing innocent baby humans while claiming they are n't actually baby humans is absurd in the extreme . Killing any group of innocent people using the lie " ... but these people are n't really people so its okay " is an outage of horrendous magnitude that must not be allowed to continue to slaughter any segment of humanity in order to appease the carnal degradations of any other .
translation: 杀害无辜的婴儿，却声称他们实际上不是婴儿，这是极其荒谬的。用“……但这些人不是真正的人，所以没关系”这样的谎言杀害任何一群无辜的人，都是极其可怕的破坏行为，绝不能允许为了满足其他人的肉欲堕落而继续屠杀任何人类群体。

source: Klein was at a Mill Valley espresso bar - this was back when she still drank espresso - when she met a limo driver . He worked for Michael Klein , the son of one of the founders of Bally 's Las Vegas resort and casino . Michael Klein , now 47XX , was a multimillionaire whiz kid with a business degree from Harvard who had recently sold his telecommunications company . He had given up his fast-track life in Manhattan , one in which he ate out with abandon 200 nights a year , and moved to the Bay Area where he met Grateful Dead guitarist Bob Weir at a flag football game . Klein ended up touring with the band and running Weir 's Novato-based guitar company , Modulus . The two also shared some political causes , most notably efforts to save the world 's rain forests .
translation: 克莱因在Mill Valley的一家意式咖啡吧遇到了一位 limo司机——那还是她还在喝意式浓缩咖啡的时候。这位司机为迈克尔·克莱因（Michael Klein）开车，迈克尔·克莱因是Bally拉斯维加斯度假村和赌场创始人的儿子。现年47岁的迈克尔·克莱因是一位哈佛商学院毕业的百万富翁天才，最近刚刚卖掉了自己的电信公司。他放弃了在曼哈顿的快节奏生活——每年大约有200个夜晚在外面尽情用餐——搬到了旧金山湾区。在那里，他在一场老式美式足球比赛中认识了感恩而死乐队的吉他手鲍勃·韦尔（Bob Weir）。克莱因最终加入了乐队巡演，并接管了韦尔位于诺瓦托的吉他公司Modulus。两人还共同致力于一些政治事业，最值得一提的是保护世界雨林的努力。

source: Many of the young people who once left the island in search of better paying jobs in the cities have returned , disillusioned with their fading prospects . Because of high unemployment rates , some have no choice but to move back in with parents and grandparents , but others see the lifestyle of their forbearers as a viable alternative .
translation: 许多曾离岛前往城市寻求高薪工作的年轻人，因对日渐黯淡的前景感到失望，如今纷纷返回故里。由于失业率居高不下，有些人别无选择只能搬回父母或祖父母的住所，但也有人将祖辈的生活方式视为可行的替代选择。

source: Most commonly you are audited because a computer has raised a number of " flags . " It 's a matter of percentage . If your tax return reveals deductions that , in the opinion of the IRS , exceed an acceptable percentage in a certain area , you will probably be selected for an audit . For instance , if you declare unusually high medical expenses or claim several thousand dollars in charitable contributions , your return triggers flags . If enough flags go up , your return is selected for audit .
translation: 通常，你会被审计是因为电脑已经提出了很多“红旗”。这是一个百分比的问题。如果你的税务申报表显示出扣除额，在美国国税局（IRS）的看法中，在某一特定领域超过了可接受的百分比，你可能会被选中进行审计。例如，如果你申报异常高的医疗费用或声称有几千美元的慈善捐款，你的申报表就会触发红旗。如果足够多的红旗被提起，你的申报表就会被选中进行审计。

source: Oliver’s colour rose as he said this; he breathed quickly; and there was a curious working of the mouth and nostrils, which Mr. Claypole thought must be the immediate precursor of a violent fit of crying. Under this impression he returned to the charge.
translation: 奥利弗说这话时，脸红了；他急促地呼吸着；嘴巴和鼻孔里有一种奇怪的抽动，克莱波尔先生以为这一定是奥利弗即将号啕大哭的前奏。克莱波尔先生这么认为，因此他继续说下去。

source: One afternoon, the Dodger and Master Bates being engaged out that evening, the first-named young gentleman took it into his head to evince some anxiety regarding the decoration of his person (to do him justice, this was by no means an habitual weakness with him); and, with this end and aim, he condescendingly commanded Oliver to assist him in his toilet, straightway.
translation: 一天下午，机灵鬼和贝茨少爷晚上要外出，这位小绅士突然心血来潮，想要穿戴讲究一些（必须承认，这绝对不是他固有的弱点）。既然如此立意，他立即屈尊降贵，吩咐奥立弗马上侍候他穿戴起来。

source: Only his daughter had the power of charming this black brooding from his mind. She was the golden thread that united him to a Past beyond his misery, and to a Present beyond his misery: and the sound of her voice, the light of her face, the touch of her hand, had a strong beneficial influence with him almost always. Not absolutely always, for she could recall some occasions on which her power had failed; but they were few and slight, and she believed them over.
translation: 唯有他的女儿拥有驱散他心头的阴郁的力量。她是一根金线，把他和过去饱受苦难的岁月连接起来，也把他和现在远离苦难的岁月连接起来；她的声音，她容光焕发的面容，她的抚摸，几乎总是能对他产生强大的有益影响。不过也不是绝对如此，因为她也有过几次力量失效的时候；但这种情况不多，而且她相信也不会再次发生。

source: Problem Solver -- Caine was a tinkerer . He loves to figure out how to make things better . More than that , he 's a problem solver . When his dad suggests he build a claw of his own for a game , Caine MacGyvers something out of string and a hook . Not too different from a young Steve Jobs , who spent countless hours fiddling with electronics and building kits when he was a kid .
translation: 问题解决者——凯恩是个发明家。他喜欢琢磨如何让事物变得更好。更重要的是，他是一个解决问题的人。当他的爸爸建议他为一个游戏制作自己的夹子时，凯恩用绳子和一个钩子“MacGyver”出了一个。这与年轻的史蒂夫·乔布斯小时候的行为颇为相似，那时的他花费无数个小时摆弄电子设备和组装模型。

source: Regular daily consumption of caffeine in three or more cups of coffee is known to reduce cognitive decline among the aging . It now seems to preserve- even restoreworking memory in those with Alzheimer 's disease , by inhibiting production of beta-amyloid , a protein that accumulates in the aging brain and forms plaques that give rise to the degenerative disease . University of South Florida scientists found that caffeine reduces amyloid deposition in the hippocampi of rats .
translation: 每天常规饮用三杯或更多咖啡因可以减少老年人的认知衰退。现在看来，它还能通过抑制β-淀粉样蛋白的产生来保护甚至恢复阿尔茨海默病患者的日常工作记忆，这种蛋白质在老化的大脑中积累并形成导致退行性疾病斑块。南佛罗里达大学的科学家发现，咖啡因可以减少大鼠海马区的淀粉样蛋白沉积。

source: Some recent research questions the effectiveness of glucosamine and chondroitin sulfate , but strong evidence suggests that a high-quality brand can help reduce joint pain and inflammation without some of the side effects associated with NSAIDs . Look for a supplement that is NSF " Certified for Sport . " My go-to is Cosamin ASU , made by Nutramax .
translation: 最近的一些研究质疑葡萄糖胺和软骨素的有效性，但是有力的证据表明，高品质的品牌可以帮助减少关节疼痛和炎症，而不产生与非甾体抗炎药（NSAIDs）相关的一些副作用。寻找获得NSF“运动认证”的补充剂。我的首选是由Nutramax生产的Cosamin ASU。

source: The Allez Comp Compact comes outfitted with the new SRAM Apex group ( and Tektro brake calipers ) and Mavic CXP22 rims . The frame is E5 aluminum , which Specialized claims to be 20 percent stiffer than 2010 's incarnation . A FACT carbon fork ( with aluminum crown and steerer tube ) rounds out the package .
translation: Allez Comp Compact 配备了全新的 SRAM Apex 组（以及 Tektro 刹车卡钳）和 Mavic CXP22 车圈。车架采用 E5 铝合金，Specialized 声称其比 2010 年的车型僵硬度提高了 20%。FACT 碳纤维前叉（带有铝制冠部和方向管）完成了这一套装备。

source: The Canadian health system already imposes limits on premiums and budget spending . Under Canada 's government-funded health system , established nationwide in 1971 , patients shoulder little or none of the cost of their care . This predictably has escalated demands for services and thus prompted a steady tightening of government regulations to control costs . The results : physician fees are rigidly controlled and the introduction of new technology and certain services are limited . ( See " Should We Adopt Canada 's Health Care System ? " CR , May 1990 . ) To see how the Clinton plan might affect patients , therefore , it is instructive to look at what global budgets and price controls have meant for Canada .
translation: 加拿大的医疗体系已经对保费和预算开支施加了限制。在1971年在全国范围内建立的加拿大政府资助的医疗体系中，患者几乎不需要或不需要承担医疗费用。这自然导致了对服务的需求增加，因此引发了政府法规的不断收紧以控制成本。结果：医生费被严格控制，新技术和某些服务的引入受到限制。（参见“我们应该采用加拿大的医疗体系吗？”CR，1990年5月。）因此，要了解克林顿计划可能如何影响患者，查看全球预算和价格控制对加拿大的影响是很有启发性的。

source: The Jew inflicted a smart blow on Oliver’s shoulders with the club; and was raising it for a second, when the girl, rushing forward, wrested it from his hand. She flung it into the fire, with a force that brought some of the glowing coals whirling out into the room.
translation: 那个犹太人用棍子在奥利弗的肩膀上狠狠地打了一下，正要举起手来再打第二下时，女孩冲上前去，从他手中夺过了棍子。她用力将棍子扔进了火里，一些烧红的煤块随之飞溅到了房间里。

source: The Jew released his hold, and they rushed tumultuously from the room. The candle, wasted by the draught, was standing where it had been placed. It showed them only the empty staircase, and their own white faces. They listened intently: a profound silence reigned throughout the house.
translation: 犹太人放开了他的手，他们纷纷混乱地冲出了房间。被风吹得快要熄灭的蜡烛仍然放在原来的地方。它只照亮了空荡荡的楼梯和他们自己的苍白面容。他们专心地倾听着：整栋房子里一片深深的寂静。

source: The Omaha , Neb. , firm now expects to earn 16 cents to 19 cents a share in the second quarter ending in March and 56 cents to 79 cents a share for the full 2004 fiscal year . The top end of the projections did n't change , but the bottom end was lifted . Last month , Ameritrade expected earnings per share could fall to as low as 13 cents for the second quarter and to 53 cents for the full fiscal year .
translation: 该总部位于内布拉斯加州奥马哈的公司现在预计在截至3月份结束的第二季度每股盈利为16至19美分，全年2004财年每股盈利为56至79美分。预期中的最高点没有变化，但最低点有所提升。上个月， ameritrade 预计第二季度每股盈利可能低至13美分，全年财年每股盈利为53美分。

source: The allusion served as a timely reminder to Darnay that this disagreeable companion had, of his own free will, assisted him in the strait of the day. He turned the dialogue to that point, and thanked him for it.
translation: 这句话恰好提醒了达尔内，这位讨厌的伙伴自愿帮助他度过难关。达尔内将话题转到了这一点上，并向这位伙伴表示感谢。

source: The ambivalence reflects the diversity in society , says psychologist Marilyn Ruman , Encino , Calif . " When you feel really committed to something , you have to examine it , " she says . " Most people believe a value worth holding is a value worth examining . This has been a time of examining our values . "
translation: 这种矛盾反映了社会的多样性，心理学家梅林达·卢曼（Marilyn Ruman，居住在加利福尼亚州恩西诺）指出。“当你非常投入某件事物时，你必须对其进行审视，”她说。“大多数人认为值得持有的价值观也是值得进行审视的价值观。这是一个对价值观进行审视的时期。”

source: The felicitous idea occurred to me a morning or two later when I woke, that the best step I could take towards making myself uncommon was to get out of Biddy everything she knew. In pursuance of this luminous conception I mentioned to Biddy when I went to Mr. Wopsle’s great-aunt’s at night, that I had a particular reason for wishing to get on in life, and that I should feel very much obliged to her if she would impart all her learning to me. Biddy, who was the most obliging of girls, immediately said she would, and indeed began to carry out her promise within five minutes.
translation: 一两天后的早晨，我突然有了一个好主意：要想使自己变得不同寻常，唯一的办法就是把比迪所知道的一切都从她那里掏出来。按照这个明智的想法，那天晚上我去看望沃普尔大叔的姑妈时，告诉比迪，我有充分理由渴望在人世间出人头地，如果她能把她的学问传授给我，我将十分感激。比迪是个最乐于助人的姑娘，她当即表示愿意，并且五分钟之内就着手履行她的诺言。

source: The message was from someone who actually does know about tough losses : former Navy coach Paul Evans . Eighteen games into his first season at Navy , Lange decided to take him up on his offer . He called . He wanted to talk . As frustrating as his team 's shooting had been , the fact that the Midshipmen had given up 63 points to a team averaging fewer than 40 a game in the Patriot League was even more disturbing .
translation: 这封短信来自一个确实了解大败之痛的人：前海军队教练保罗·埃文斯。兰格在海军队的第一个赛季进行到第18场比赛时，决定接受他的邀请。他打电话来了，想要和他谈谈。尽管球队的投篮表现不尽如人意，但海军队让给了平均得分不到40分的对手63分，在爱国联盟中更是罕见，这一点更加令人不安。

source: The old man was up, betimes, next morning, and waited impatiently for the appearance of his new associate, who after a delay that seemed interminable, at length presented himself, and commenced a voracious assault on the breakfast.
translation: 老人第二天一早就起床了，不耐烦地等待着他的新搭档出现。新搭档似乎迟迟不来，让人等得好像没有尽头，终于出现了，然后便开始狼吞虎咽地吃起早餐来。

source: This unique show is the brainchild of producer/director Jim Duffy , a veteran documentary filmmaker , author and musician who has created programming for Discovery Network and other national media outlets . " I combined the two elements I love most : music and storytelling , " explains Duffy . " This is the ' 60s takes the audience on a journey -- one that 's designed to entertain , educate , and stimulate . "
translation: 这个独特的节目是由制作人/导演吉姆·多菲一手策划的，他是一位资深的纪录片制作人、作家和音乐家，曾为Discovery网络和其他国家级媒体机构创作过节目。“我将我最爱的两个元素结合在了一起：音乐和讲故事，”多菲解释说。“‘60年代’带领观众踏上了一段旅程——这是一段旨在娱乐、教育和启发的旅程。”

source: To catch smuggled weapons , visitors are searched before entering the jails and employees pass through metal detectors , or magnometers . But in October , when Correction Department investigators conducted a surprise check of the staff entrances at nine Rikers jails , they found the magnometers were not on at three of the jails , according to a report on the examination . At six of the jails , investigators noted , the staff members were not accustomed to regular searches . Officers have since been retrained in security procedures , an official said .
translation: 为了查获走私武器，访客在进入监狱前要接受搜查，工作人员要通过金属探测器或磁力计。但根据检查报告，10 月，惩教局调查人员对 9 所赖克斯监狱的工作人员入口进行了突击检查，发现其中 3 所监狱的磁力计没有打开。调查人员指出，其中 6 所监狱的工作人员不习惯定期搜查。一名官员表示，此后警官们已接受安全程序再培训。

source: Well , then I guess Leslie should have beaten them 50-7 . I 'll say without a doubt that there are likely about 25 teams in the league who would trade their top back for Chris Johnson , and this " top 5 DT " has 17 tackles and one sack in 8 games . In addition to all these top players we have , we also have the nucleus of our team in their 4th year of play or less .
translation: 那么，我想莱斯利应该以50比7击败了他们。我敢肯定，联盟中大约有25支球队愿意用他们的顶级跑卫来换取克里斯·约翰逊，而这个‘前五名的防守截锋’在8场比赛中只有17次擒抱和1次擒杀。除了我们拥有的这些顶级球员，我们的球队核心成员也大多处于职业生涯的第四个年头或更早阶段。

source: When the disciples got out of the boat , they saw some bread and a charcoal fire with fish on it . Jesus told his disciples , " Bring some of the fish you just caught . " Simon Peter got back into the boat and dragged the net to shore . In it were one hundred fifty-three large fish , but still the net did not rip .
translation: 当门徒们从船上出来时，他们看见了一些面包、炭火以及上面有鱼。耶稣对他的门徒说：“把你们刚才捕到的鱼拿来吧。”西门彼得回到船上，拉起了渔网。网里有大鱼一百五十三条，但渔网却没有破。

source: While Cohen 's teaching methods instill an excitement about business in her students , they also convey lessons about failure that any embattled entrepreneur would understand . Unfettered by society 's scrutiny , her students are tenacious : if one idea for a business does n't fly , they eagerly come up with another .
translation: 虽然科恩的教学方法会让学生们对商业产生浓厚的兴趣，但也会让他们明白失败的教训，这是任何一个陷入困境的企业家都能理解的。学生们不会被社会的审视所束缚，他们很执着：如果一个商业创意没有成功，他们会很积极地想出另一个。

source: Who gave them out, whence they last came, where they began, through what agency they crookedly quivered and jerked, scores at a time, over the heads of the crowd, like a kind of lightning, no eye in the throng could have told; but, muskets were being distributed—so were cartridges, powder, and ball, bars of iron and wood, knives, axes, pikes, every weapon that distracted ingenuity could discover or devise. People who could lay hold of nothing else, set themselves with bleeding hands to force stones and bricks out of their places in walls. Every pulse and heart in Saint Antoine was on high-fever strain and at high-fever heat. Every living creature there held life as of no account, and was demented with a passionate readiness to sacrifice it.
translation: 是谁发的枪，从什么地方发的，从哪儿来的，是谁起的头，那万头攒动的人群谁也说不上来。不过，火枪正在分发——也在分发弹药、火药、炮弹、铁棍、木棍、小刀、巨斧、长矛，以及发了疯的聪明人所能发现或设计出来的各种武器。什么也抓不着的人便用自己流血的手从墙上挖出石头和砖块。圣安托万的每一道脉搏和心跳都达到了高度紧张和高度炽热的程度。每一个活人都把生死置之度外，被随时准备牺牲的热情激得发了狂。

source: Yet sometimes , the worst possible betrayals can be healed . In my experience of working with families who are trying to reconcile , the best outcomes occur when adult children are able to talk about their experience in the family and the parents are willing to admit to the possibility that they caused harm .
translation: 但有时，最严重的背叛是可以治愈的。根据我与试图和解的家庭合作的经验，最好的结果是，成年子女能够谈论他们在家庭中的经历，父母愿意承认他们可能造成了伤害。

source: “Emigrants have no rights, Evrémonde,” was the stolid reply. The officer wrote until he had finished, read over to himself what he had written, sanded it, and handed it to Defarge, with the words “In secret.”
translation: “移民没有权利，埃弗蒙德先生。”军官的回答十分冷静。他一直写到把内容写完，然后自己又看了一遍，撒上一层粉末，最后把文件交给了德费拉尔，附带说道：“要秘密进行。”

source: “I won’t be ten minutes, sir,” said Oliver, eagerly. Having buttoned up the bank-note in his jacket pocket, and placed the books carefully under his arm, he made a respectful bow, and left the room. Mrs. Bedwin followed him to the street-door, giving him many directions about the nearest way, and the name of the bookseller, and the name of the street: all of which Oliver said he clearly understood. Having superadded many injunctions to be sure and not take cold, the old lady at length permitted him to depart.
translation: “我不会超过十分钟的，先生。”奥利弗急切地说。他把钞票扣在了上衣口袋里，小心翼翼地把书夹在腋下，然后恭敬地鞠了一躬，离开了房间。贝丁太太把他送到街门口，给他指了许多最近的路线，还有书店的名字和街道的名字：这些奥利弗都说他听得非常清楚。老太太又再三叮嘱他一定要小心别着凉，最后才让他离开。

source: “Not all of one kind,” resumed Biddy. “He may be too proud to let any one take him out of a place that he is competent to fill, and fills well and with respect. To tell you the truth, I think he is; though it sounds bold in me to say so, for you must know him far better than I do.”
translation: “并非全是同一类型，”比迪继续说道，“他可能太过骄傲，不愿让任何人把他从一个他有能力胜任且做得很好的位置上移开。说实话，我认为他就是这样的；尽管我说这话听起来有些大胆，因为你们肯定比我更了解他。”

source: “Thankee, Sir,” returned Joe, evidently dispirited by the proposal, “since you are so kind as make chice of coffee, I will not run contrairy to your own opinions. But don’t you never find it a little ’eating?”

source: “The rest, eh, Pip?” said Joe, looking at it with a slow, searching eye, “One, two, three. Why, here’s three Js, and three Os, and three J-O, Joes in it, Pip!”

source: “You bring me, to-morrow morning early, that file and them wittles. You bring the lot to me, at that old Battery over yonder. You do it, and you never dare to say a word or dare to make a sign concerning your having seen such a person as me, or any person sumever, and you shall be let to live. You fail, or you go from my words in any partickler, no matter how small it is, and your heart and your liver shall be tore out, roasted, and ate. Now, I ain’t alone, as you may think I am. There’s a young man hid with me, in comparison with which young man I am a Angel. That young man hears the words I speak. That young man has a secret way pecooliar to himself, of getting at a boy, and at his heart, and at his liver. It is in wain for a boy to attempt to hide himself from that young man. A boy may lock his door, may be warm in bed, may tuck himself up, may draw the clothes over his head, may think himself comfortable and safe, but that young man will softly creep and creep his way to him and tear him open. I am a keeping that young man from harming of you at the present moment, with great difficulty. I find it wery hard to hold that young man off of your inside. Now, what do you say?”
translation: “明天一大清早，你就把那文件和吃的东西给我拿来。你要把所有的东西都送到那边的古炮台来交给我。你照办了，就不敢说你见过我这样一个人，或者任何其他人的只言片语，或者做任何暗示，那就可以活命。你要是办不到，或者违背我的话，不管事情多么小，我就要挖出你的心肝，烤熟了吃了。现在，你可别以为我是一个人来的。和我一起藏着的还有一个年轻人，我跟那年轻人一比，简直是个天使。那年轻人听到了我刚才说的话。那年轻人有一种独特的手段，可以轻而易举地找到一个孩子，再挖出他的心肝。孩子要想躲藏是没用的。他可以把门反锁，钻进被窝，把自己裹得严严实实的，把被子蒙在头上，自以为很舒服、很安全，可是那年轻人会轻轻地、慢慢地向他爬过来，把他撕成碎片。我正尽最大的努力不让那个年轻人伤害你。我感到很难控制住不让那年轻人去撕碎你的心肝。那么，你说怎么办吧？”

source: “You shall read them, if you behave well,” said the old gentleman kindly; “and you will like that, better than looking at the outsides,—that is, some cases; because there are books of which the backs and covers are by far the best parts.”

After our meeting , he spoke to about 300 people who were in the garden to hear him talk about his views .
